name: Go Gunhee
title: Chairman of the Korean Hunters Association

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Chairman's Will
basic.description: Gunhee gathers the Power of Brilliant Light to attack the enemy.

core.name: Abdominal Crush
core.description: Gunhee punches upward and then strikes downward. Inflicts [Airborne] on first hit; [Knocks Down] on final hit. Becomes Heavy Attack: Abdominal Crush when [Fragment of Brilliant Light] is active.

skill.name: Fighting Spirit
skill.description: Gunhee attacks the enemy by enveloping his entire body with the Energy of Brilliant Light. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit. Becomes Heavy Attack: Fighting Spirit when [Fragment of Brilliant Light] is active.

skill.name: Power of Brilliant Light
skill.description: Gunhee gathers Energy of Brilliant Light and lets it spread across his entire body, then punches the ground to release the energy in all directions. Inflicts [Airborne] on final hit. Applies [Fragment of Brilliant Light] effect.

support.name: Instant Destruction
support.description: Gunhee attacks by releasing a high-speed blast of brilliant light. Applies [Aura of Brilliant Light] (Defense +20%, Shield equal to 10% of Sung Jinwoo's Defense, Light damage +20%, 20 seconds).

qte.name: Clean Sweep
qte.description: Gunhee jumps forward, focuses the Energy of Brilliant Light on the ground, and releases it. Knocks Down on first hit; inflicts [Airborne] on final hit.

ultimate.name: Supernova
ultimate.description: Gunhee gathers the Power of Brilliant Light into one fist and releases it in front of himself. Inflicts [Airborne] on hit.

passive.name: Broken Vessel
passive.description: [Broken Vessel] applies when the user enters a stage (decreases received HP Recovery Rate by 50%, infinite). When the user uses Clean Sweep or Fighting Spirit it applies [Ruler's Aura] (Defense +30%, Shield equal to 20% of Go Gunhee's Defense, 10 seconds). When the user uses Power of Brilliant Light it applies [Fragment of Brilliant Light] (activates Core Attack 1 time; Core Attack becomes Heavy Attack: Abdominal Crush with 75% damage increase; Fighting Spirit becomes Heavy Attack: Fighting Spirit with 80% damage increase, 15 seconds).

advancements: When the user uses Fighting Spirit or Heavy Attack: Fighting Spirit it activates their Core Attack and Core Attack becomes Heavy Attack: Abdominal Crush for 15 seconds. When the user uses Power of Brilliant Light, it applies [Will of Brilliant Light] to all team members (Light damage +8% and Critical Hit Damage +8% per Light team member, 20 seconds).
When the user uses Supernova it deals almighty Break damage. [Ruler's Aura] is enhanced (Defense +50%, Shield equal to 20% of Go Gunhee's Defense, Damage Taken -25%, 15 seconds).

The damage of Supernova increases by 60% when dealt to targets that possess a Break Gauge. When Supernova hits a target without a Break Gauge it grants [Will of the Fragment] to team members (Critical Hit Damage +30% and QTE damage +200%, 20 seconds).
